name: AML/CTF & Financial-Sanctions Legal Corpus — Australia (v1)
tagline: A neutral, provenance-first record of Australian anti-money-laundering / counter-terrorism-financing and financial-sanctions law, with the FATF standard as backbone. Every text carries its official source, retrieval date, citation, jurisdiction, legal status, language, an authoritative-status flag, and a SHA-256 hash; every change is a new dated version. A reference record of the law — not legal or compliance advice.
